2022-23 Eastern Illinois Panthers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 9-22 (5-13, 10th in OVC MBB)

Coach: Marty Simmons

PS/G: 68.8 (252nd of 363)

PA/G: 72.1 (245th of 363)

SRS: -14.09 (339th of 363)

SOS: -6.75 (333rd of 363)

ORtg: 96.9 (329th of 363)

DRtg: 101.5 (174th of 363)
